data.description: Amazon plans to shift the annual Prime Day sale to June from July. $AMZN

data.title: USA Today Names B&H Photo One of America's Most Trusted Brands
data.description: B&H Photo, a renowned retailer of photo, video, audio, computer, and technology products, was recently acknowledged by USA Today for the firm trust they have garnered from customers over the years due to their expert service. The announcement was made on March 12, 2026, in New York. This recognition serves as a testament to B&H's dedication to providing quality service and products, solidifying its position as a leader in the industry.
Trump ends remarks at White House.

data.title: Rubrik Swings To Q4 Profit, Revenue Outlook Tops Estimates
data.description: Rubrik's stock saw an increase following the release of their fiscal fourth quarter financial results, which surpassed expectations. The company reported a profit for the quarter and provided revenue guidance that exceeded estimates. This news was featured on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Where Anthropic Stands With The DOD As AI-War Debate Continues
data.description: A federal judge expedited a crucial hearing for Anthropic, following questions raised about the DOD's classification of supply chain risks. The ongoing AI-war debate has put Anthropic's position in focus, with increasing scrutiny. The development comes amid a broader discussion on the implications of artificial intelligence in the defense sector.

data.title: Northern Virginia Association of Realtors® Launches NOVA Housing Supply Framework to Expand Housing Options and Preserve the Region's Economic Competitiveness
data.description: In Fairfax, Virginia, on March 12, 2026, the Northern Virginia Association of Realtors® (NVAR) disclosed a collaboration with the Northern Virginia Chamber (NVC) and the Northern Virginia Building Industry Association (NVBIA) to introduce the NOVA Housing Supply Framework. This initiative aims to address housing supply challenges in Northern Virginia and is set to involve significant stakeholders in the region.

data.title: Trump to host exclusive event for top holders of Solana meme coin; coin's value briefly surged post-event announcement.
data.description: The value of the Solana meme coin saw a temporary increase following the announcement by the team about an upcoming exclusive event for top holders.

data.title: Ryder CFO to Address J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference
data.description: Executive Vice President & CFO, Cristina Gallo-Aquino from Ryder System, Inc. (NYSE: R) will provide an update on the company at the 2026 J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference. The event will take place in Washington, D.C. on Tuesday, March 17, 2026, at 12:20 p.m. Eastern Standard Time. To access the live webcast, visit https://investors.ryder.com. Ryder System, Inc. is a prominent company in the industry.

data.title: SentinelOne Stock Slides On Q4 Earnings, Soft Q1 Outlook
data.description: SentinelOne Inc., listed on NYSE under the symbol S, unveiled its Q4 financial results post-market close on the recent Thursday. The company announced Q4 revenue amounting to $271.15 million, slightly below the predicted value of roughly $271.16 million as per Benzinga Pro. Despite falling short on revenue, the cybersecurity firm outperformed market expectations for Q4 adjusted earnings, reporting seven cents per share compared to the estimated six cents per share. Notably, there was a 20% year-over-year surge in the total revenue. Furthermore, the Annualized Recurring Revenue (ARR) witnessed a robust 22% yearly growth to reach $1.12 billion by January 31. This financial revelation impacted SentinelOne's stock positively, contributing to its current upward trend.

data.title: ACTEC Elects 29 New Fellows to the College
data.description: The Board of Regents of The American College of Trust and Estate Counsel (ACTEC) recently met during the College's 2026 Annual Meeting in Tampa, Florida, to review nominations for a fresh group of ACTEC Fellows. The College is excited to unveil the selection of new class, which includes [number] distinguished and talented individuals who have been recognized for their exceptional contributions to the field of trust and estate counsel.

data.title: Blue Ridge Bankshares, Inc. Announces Executive Transition
data.description: On March 12, 2026, in Richmond, Virginia, Blue Ridge Bankshares, Inc. revealed that G. William Beale would be retiring from his positions at the Company and Blue Ridge Bank, National Association. The Company, listed on NYSE American as BRBS, serves as the holding firm for Blue Ridge Bank.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Pellera Technologies/
data.description: Pellera Technologies has been honored as the Palo Alto Networks 2025 North America Small-Medium Business Partner of the Year. The award was announced on 12-Mar-2026 by Pellera Technologies and represents a significant achievement in the field. The company has made some adjustments to the original news release, which was distributed via PR Newswire. This recognition highlights Pellera Technologies' success and commitment to excellence in the industry.

data.title: Expert Homebuilder Paul H Schaefer II of Punta Gorda Highlights Top Features for Modern Florida Homes in HelloNation
data.description: In Punta Gorda, Florida, as of March 12, 2026, a recent article by HelloNation explores the key features that are defining homes in the state this year. This article highlights insights from Home Building Expert Paul H Schaefer II of Sage Homes LLC, shedding light on the most popular trends.

data.title: Legacy Housing Corporation Reports Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: Legacy Housing Corporation, a company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol LEGH, revealed its financial results for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025. The announcement was made on March 12, 2026, from Bedford, Texas.

data.title: Hanover Bancorp, Inc. Completes $35 Million Private Placement of Subordinated Notes
data.description: On March 12, 2026, Hanover Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: HNVR) successfully finished a private placement of $35 million in total principal amount of fixed-to-floating rate subordinated notes due 2036 (the “Notes”). The parent company of Hanover Community Bank, Hanover Bancorp, Inc., announced the completion of this placement to accredited investors and certain qualified institutional buyers.

data.title: VAALCO Energy, Inc. Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
data.description: On March 12, 2026, Vaalco Energy, Inc. (NYSE: EGY, LSE: EGY) disclosed its operational and financial performance for Q4 and full year 2025 along with their year-end 2025 reserves. The company also shared operational and financial forecasts for Q1 and full year 2026.

data.title: CPKC certifies 14 new Site Ready locations across North America
data.description: Canadian Pacific Kansas City (TSX: CP) (NYSE: CP) (CPKC) disclosed the certification of 14 fresh Site Ready rail-served industrial development spots located strategically to expedite commercial growth in North America. The announcement was made in Calgary, AB, on March 12, 2026.

data.title: PBF Energy to Participate in Piper Sandler Energy Conference
data.description: Parsippany, New Jersey - On March 12, 2026, PBF Energy Inc. (NYSE:PBF) disclosed their participation in the upcoming Piper Sandler Energy Conference scheduled for March 16-17, 2026. The company's management team members will be part of this event. Access to any presentation materials shared during the conference will be provided on the Investor Relations platform.

data.title: Axcelis Announces CFO Transition
data.description: Today, Axcelis Technologies, Inc. disclosed that David Ryzhik, who serves as the Senior Vice President of Investor Relations and Corporate Strategy, will take on the role of Interim Chief Financial Officer. This appointment was made in Beverly, Massachusetts on March 12, 2026. Axcelis Technologies, Inc. is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol ACLS. David Ryzhik's new responsibilities come amidst changes in the company's financial leadership.

data.title: In HelloNation, Masonry Expert Alan Williams Explains Why Brick Facades Pull Away from Buildings
data.description: In Richmond, Virginia on March 12, 2026, an article by HelloNation highlighted Masonry Expert Alan Williams from A. W. Masonry & Restoration, discussing the reasons behind bulging or separating brick facades on buildings. The article delves into the risks associated with this issue.
